new_epic.title: User Management
new_epic.approach_summary: REST API with CRUD operations for user accounts
success_criteria: POST /api/users creates a new user account with email validation
DELETE /api/users/:id removes account and associated data

open_epics.title: Admin Panel
open_epics.approach_summary: Admin interface for user management and system configuration
success_criteria: GET /api/users returns paginated list of all users for admin review
PATCH /api/users/:id allows admin to modify user roles and status
Admin can export user data via GET /api/users/export
